title: Deliberate Distortion Synesthesia ENG Translation
wikitext: []: Deliberate Distortion: Synesthesia ENG Translation             Quote Post by xPearse » Sun Jul 27, 2014 9:00 am I'm unsure if anyone really knows about the 3 Russian Evangelion fan games, I noticed them months ago and they peaked my interest. The first 2 aren't of much concern but its the 3rd game that should be, its a visual novel type game released in 2008 with various endings and events so it would take multiple playthroughs to fully experience. They drew their own art, made their own soundtrack and added in many references to various other video games, this caused a misunderstanding over at the visual novel database many years ago. That's as much as I know of people actually talking about the game, anyway I'll leave various links below for those who want to read more. Page on Evangelion not end (Eva Russian Community) http://www.evangelion-not-end.ru/multimedia/games/item/103-dds.html Forum topic on Evangelion not end http://www.evangelion-not-end.ru/Portal/index.php?showtopic=12064 Official site http://www.hd-team.info/ I have been talking with one of the developers about an English translation since a month ago, it turns out they already had a rough translation done (Presumably for years) but just didn't get around to implementing it. That's where I came in, I'll be helping with it and to try and get some interest for the fan game I decided to post here. A few screens have been done so far but that's only been a test, we'll get to work real soon and make some progress. Here are some pics. https://www.dropbox.com/s/dyp9sc3p36dxi5a/%D0%A1%D0%BA%D1%80%D0%B8%D0%BD%D1%88%D0%BE%D1%82%202014-07-27%2015.25.37.png https://www.dropbox.com/s/3nyefddt49nnaxu/%D0%A1%D0%BA%D1%80%D0%B8%D0%BD%D1%88%D0%BE%D1%82%202014-07-27%2015.27.07.png https://www.dropbox.com/s/ul51msoqryokr02/%D0%A1%D0%BA%D1%80%D0%B8%D0%BD%D1%88%D0%BE%D1%82%202014-07-27%2015.27.26.png

Article: Deliberate Distortion Synesthesia ENG Translation
[]: Deliberate Distortion: Synesthesia ENG Translation             Quote Post by xPearse » Sun Jul 27, 2014 9:00 am I'm unsure if anyone really knows about the 3 Russian Evangelion fan games, I noticed them months ago and they peaked my interest. The first 2 aren't of much concern but its the 3rd game that should be, its a visual novel type game released in 2008 with various endings and events so it would take multiple playthroughs to fully experience. They drew their own art, made their own soundtrack and added in many references to various other video games, this caused a misunderstanding over at the visual novel database many years ago. That's as much as I know of people actually talking about the game, anyway I'll leave various links below for those who want to read more. Page on Evangelion not end (Eva Russian Community) http://www.evangelion-not-end.ru/multimedia/games/item/103-dds.html Forum topic on Evangelion not end http://www.evangelion-not-end.ru/Portal/index.php?showtopic=12064 Official site http://www.hd-team.info/ I have been talking with one of the developers about an English translation since a month ago, it turns out they already had a rough translation done (Presumably for years) but just didn't get around to implementing it. That's where I came in, I'll be helping with it and to try and get some interest for the fan game I decided to post here. A few screens have been done so far but that's only been a test, we'll get to work real soon and make some progress. Here are some pics. https://www.dropbox.com/s/dyp9sc3p36dxi5a/%D0%A1%D0%BA%D1%80%D0%B8%D0%BD%D1%88%D0%BE%D1%82%202014-07-27%2015.25.37.png https://www.dropbox.com/s/3nyefddt49nnaxu/%D0%A1%D0%BA%D1%80%D0%B8%D0%BD%D1%88%D0%BE%D1%82%202014-07-27%2015.27.07.png https://www.dropbox.com/s/ul51msoqryokr02/%D0%A1%D0%BA%D1%80%D0
